title: 有馬記念の後に・昂揚

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though Satono Diamond missed out on first
place, she still has a thrilling race with Kitasan
Black.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd cheers the two of them on, and
Kitasan Black answers their fervor by announcing
her plan to run in the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon hearing this, Satono Diamond declares
she'll also race in the Osaka Hai, and the crowd is
thrilled at the prospect of a rematch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After returning to her waiting room, Satono
Diamond says Kitasan Black has already
contributed to the Umamusume world by always
getting the fans excited.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wonders what she ought to do as an
illustrious runner, and explains that she wants to
use Kitasan Black as an example to think about
her own role.
